http/HTTPMethod.name: HTTPMethod
http/HTTPMethod.description: Added in version 3.11. A subclass of enum.StrEnum that defines a set of HTTP methods and descriptions written in English. Usage: >>> from http import HTTPMethod >>> >>> HTTPMethod.GET <HTTPMethod.GET> >>> HTTPMethod.GET == 'GET' True >>> HTTPMethod.GET.value 'GET' >>> HTTPMethod.GET.description 'Retrieve the target.' >>> list(HTTPMethod) [<HTTPMethod.CONNECT>, <HTTPMethod.DELETE>, <HTTPMethod.GET>, <HTTPMethod.HEAD>, <HTTPMethod.OPTIONS>, <HTTPMethod.PATCH>, <HTTPMethod.POST>, <HTTPMethod.PUT...

info.excerpt: Added in version 3.11. A subclass of enum.StrEnum that defines a set of HTTP methods and descriptions written in English. Usage: >>> from http import HTTPMethod >>> >>> HTTPMethod.GET <HTTPMethod.GET>...

http/HTTPStatus.name: HTTPStatus
http/HTTPStatus.description: Added in version 3.5. A subclass of enum.IntEnum that defines a set of HTTP status codes, reason phrases and long descriptions written in English. Usage: >>> from http import HTTPStatus >>> HTTPStatus.OK HTTPStatus.OK >>> HTTPStatus.OK == 200 True >>> HTTPStatus.OK.value 200 >>> HTTPStatus.OK.phrase 'OK' >>> HTTPStatus.OK.description 'Request fulfilled, document follows' >>> list(HTTPStatus) [HTTPStatus.CONTINUE, HTTPStatus.SWITCHING_PROTOCOLS, ...]

info.excerpt: Added in version 3.5. A subclass of enum.IntEnum that defines a set of HTTP status codes, reason phrases and long descriptions written in English. Usage: >>> from http import HTTPStatus >>> HTTPStatus...
